title: Investigate PopeBot's interactive mode and local model provider compatibility:
job:
Investigate PopeBot's interactive mode and local model provider compatibility:

1. Find all files related to "interactive mode" - search for "interactive" in the codebase
2. Examine the provider/configuration setup, especially how LM Studio/local models are handled
3. Identify what prevents interactive mode from opening when using non-Claude providers
4. Look for any errors or assumptions in the code that only account for Claude API

Return your findings about:
- What interactive mode is supposed to do
- What code block causes it to fail with LM Studio
- Any bugs or missing error handling for local models
